scripts.coco4gui:prepare: doppler run -- env PYTHONPATH=backend:backend/agent python scripts/prepare_coco4gui_for_vertex.py
scripts.dev: cd apps/web && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:desktop: cd apps/desktop && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.desktop:dist: cd apps/desktop && doppler run --config prd -- pnpm run dist
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && doppler run -- uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.dev:agent: cd EchoPrismAgent && doppler run -- uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8081
scripts.dev:livekit-agent: cd EchoPrismAgent && doppler run -- python -m agent.echo_prism.subagents.livekit.main dev
